validate.description: Run focused dotfiles validation checks for changed files
validate.template:
Run the focused validation checks for this dotfiles repo, executing only the checks relevant to the changed files.

First run `git status` and `git diff` to see what changed, then run the relevant checks from CLAUDE.md's "Focused validation" section:

- JSON files: `jq empty <file>` (settings, keybindings, opencode configs)
- Shell syntax: `bash -n <file>` for Bash, `zsh -n <file>` for zsh
- Shell format and lint: `shfmt -d <file>` (Bash/POSIX only, not zsh-specific files) and `shellcheck <file>`
- Lua format: `stylua --check <path>`
- Setup dry run: `./setup.sh --dry-run --skip-neovim-tools`
- Whitespace/conflict markers: `git diff --check`

Report each result clearly. Do not fix anything unless asked.
